message:
feat(core): add sliding_window module for time-bucketed rate monitoring

Fixed-size sliding window counter with configurable bucket granularity.
Supports rate_per_second, exceeds_rate threshold checks, snapshots,
recent_count, and serde. Uses explicit timestamps for deterministic
testing. 32 inline tests + 30 property-based tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
